name: CreatorIQ — O4 Brand Deal Rate Checker

nodes.name: Webhook — Receive Deal
Code — Market Rate Benchmark
nodes.notes:
Calculates market rate from 52K deal records.
Inputs: niche, platform, followers, offered_rate_usd, format
Outputs: market_rate, gap_pct, percentile, is_below_market, counter_offer

nodes.name: IF — Below Market?
nodes.notes:
TRUE (top): offer < 90% of market rate → warning alert
FALSE (bottom): offer ≥ 90% of market rate → good deal

assignments.name: headline
assignments.value: =⚠️ This offer is {{ $json.analysis.gap_pct }}% below market rate

assignments.name: recommendation
assignments.value: =Counter-offer ${{ $json.analysis.counter_offer_usd }}. Market rate for your tier is ${{ $json.analysis.market_rate_usd }}.

assignments.name: talking_points
assignments.value: Your engagement rate justifies market rate | Reference comparable deals in your niche | Offer 30-day exclusivity to justify higher rate | Bundle post + story + reel to increase value

nodes.name: Set — Below Market Alert
nodes.notes:
Triggered when offer is >10% below market.
Sets warning status, counter-offer, and 4 negotiation talking points.

assignments.name: talking_points
assignments.value: Accept or push for usage rights fee | Request performance bonus clause | Negotiate longer-term partnership | Ask for exclusivity premium

nodes.name: Set — Good Deal
nodes.notes:
Triggered when offer is at or above market rate.
Encourages minor upsell (usage rights, performance bonuses).

nodes.name: Merge — Combine Branches
nodes.notes: Merges WARNING and GOOD paths back into a single flow.

nodes.name: Code — Format Report
nodes.notes:
Builds the final JSON response returned to the frontend web app.
Includes: deal_summary, rate_analysis, verdict, talking_points, disclaimer.

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes:
Returns JSON analysis to the calling frontend.
CORS header (*) allows any frontend origin to call this.
Status 200 always returned — no silent failures.
